response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience across web, embedded, and distributed systems, with strong fundamentals in TDD, CI/CD, and high-throughput services (Sociomantic micro-services handling millions of req/s). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, or measurement/telemetry infrastructure — the core focus of this Principal/IC6 role. Title is 'Senior/Staff' rather than Principal, and there is no evidence of multi-team platform leadership at the IC6 scope required.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) across 15+ years
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
Proven high-scale, low-latency systems work at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP req/s)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, or feature flagging systems
No evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical analysis work — core to the role
Career level (Senior/Staff) and scope of influence appear below Principal/IC6 multi-team platform leadership

key_factors.factor: Strong distributed systems and engineering fundamentals
Seniority/scope gap vs Principal IC6 expectations
